description_text:
This model has been discontinued. The new model is Resmed Lumis 100 VPAP ST. 

Resmed Aircurve 10 ST BiPAP Machine

Resmed Aircurve 10 ST is a perfect and innovative Bilevel machine by Resmed for sleep apnea patients. The backup rate provided by Aircurve 10 ST is the best option one can ask for. It keeps the patient well ventilated and comfortable while sleeping. The machine has the best features with a good design and low sound level. The best features available in Resmed Aircurve 10 ST are as follows-


	
	Adjustable Trigger and cycle sensitivity 

	The trigger sensitivity controls how simple or challenging it is for your patient to begin breathing. When exactly your patient begins to expire is determined by the cycle sensitivity.The technology can be adjusted to meet the specific respiratory requirements of each patient, preserving patient-ventilator synchronization and minimizing work-of-breathing.
	



	
	Ti Control
	


 You can use TiControl to limit the amount of time the device is in IPAP by setting minimum (Ti Min) and maximum (Ti Max) values.


	
	Continuous leak management 
	


It maintains synchronization between you and the machine while providing continuous flow.


	
	HumidAir humidifier
	


Heated humidifier is incorporated with the climate control and maintains stable humidity and temperature settings for improved comfort.


	
	Comfort features
	


Aircurve 10 ST has Auto on/off, Mask fit, Ramp time and EPR (Expiratory Pressure Relief) that aids in a comfortable therapy.


	
	FAA Approved
	Resmed Aircurve 10 ST is FAA approved that ensures the use of this machine in airplanes.


What's in the box?


	
	Aircurve 10 ST Device
	
	
	HumidAir Heated Humidifier
	
	
	ClimateLineAir Heated Tube 
	
	
	Power supply unit
	
	
	Filters
	
	
	Travel bag
	
	
	SD card (already inserted)
	
	
	User Manual
